text: As used in this chapter, unless the context otherwise requires, the words and terms defined in NRS 485.028 to 485.120 , inclusive, have the meanings ascribed to them in those sections.
markdown:
## Title 43
### Chapter 485
##### § 485.020 — Definitions.

As used in this chapter, unless the context otherwise requires, the words and terms defined in NRS 485.028 to 485.120 , inclusive, have the meanings ascribed to them in those sections.

subsections.text: As used in this chapter, unless the context otherwise requires, the words and terms defined in NRS 485.028 to 485.120 , inclusive, have the meanings ascribed to them in those sections.
